title: Watchdog Timer Refresh
description: The system shall refresh the Independent Watchdog (IWDG) within 50ms to prevent system reset in case of deadlock.
testSteps:
1. Inject a delay loop > 50ms in the main task.
2. Observe system reset behavior via UART.
expectedResult: System resets and logs a watchdog timeout event.

title: CCSDS Telemetry Packet Format
description: All telemetry downlink packets shall conform to the CCSDS 133.0-B-1 Space Packet Protocol standard.
testSteps:
1. Generate a telemetry packet.
2. Analyze the packet header bits 0-2 (Version Number).
3. Analyze bits 3-15 (Packet Identification).
expectedResult: Packet Version Number is '000', Packet Type is correct.

title: ADCS Control Loop Timing
description: The Attitude Determination and Control System (ADCS) loop shall execute every 100ms with a jitter of less than 1ms.
testSteps:
1. Instrument the ADCS task with GPIO toggling.
2. Connect oscilloscope to GPIO pin.
3. Measure period statistics over 1000 cycles.

title: MISRA C:2012 Compliance
description: The flight software source code shall be compliant with MISRA C:2012 Mandatory and Required rules.
testSteps:
1. Run static analysis tool (e.g., CppCheck/coverity) with MISRA configuration.
2. Check report for violations.

title: Safe Mode Power Consumption
description: In Safe Mode, the total power consumption shall not exceed 500mW.
testSteps:
1. Command satellite into Safe Mode.
2. Measure current draw at 3.3V and 5V rails.
